title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models

defines.name: chain-of-thought prompting
defines.definition: A few-shot prompting method that includes intermediate natural-language reasoning steps between the input and output to elicit complex reasoning in large language models.

problem: Standard few-shot prompting performs poorly on tasks that require complex reasoning, and rationale-based training is costly because it requires many high-quality explanations.
